# Landbruks- og matdepartementet

*34 lover*

| Lov | Korttittel | Ikrafttredelse | Historikk |
|-----|-----------|----------------|-----------|
| [Første Codicill og Tillæg til Grendse-Tractaten imellem Kongerigerne Norge og Sv](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1751-10-02.md) | Lappekodisillen |  | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-1751-10-02.md) |
| [Lov om avgrensing i retten til å sleppa hingstar, oksar, verar og geitebukkar på](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1970-03-06-5.md) | Hanndyrloven | 1971-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-1970-03-06-5.md) |
| [Lov om bygdeallmenninger](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1992-06-19-59.md) | Bygdeallmenningsloven – bgdalml | 1993-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-1992-06-19-59.md) |
| [Lov om dyrevelferd](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2009-06-19-97.md) | Dyrevelferdsloven | 2010-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2009-06-19-97.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i konsesjonsloven (priskontroll på skogeiendommer, konsesjon ti](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2025-06-06-27.md) | Endringslov til konsesjonsloven | 2025-07-01, 2026-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2025-06-06-27.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i reindriftsloven (tilgjengeliggjøring av reintall og obligator](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2019-06-21-62.md) | Endringslov til reindriftsloven | 2020-01-01, Kongen bestemmer | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2019-06-21-62.md) |
| [Lov om erstatning for naturskader (naturskadeerstatningsloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2014-08-15-59.md) | Naturskadeerstatningsloven | 2017-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2014-08-15-59.md) |
| [Lov om fastsetjing og endring av eigedoms- og rettshøve på fast eigedom m.m. (jo](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2013-06-21-100.md) | Jordskiftelova – jskl | 2016-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2013-06-21-100.md) |
| [Lov om forbud mot hold av pelsdyr](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2019-06-21-63.md) | Lov om forbud mot hold av pelsdyr | 2019-07-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2019-06-21-63.md) |
| [Lov om forebygging og reduksjon av matsvinn (matsvinnloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2025-06-20-103.md) | Matsvinnloven | Kongen bestemmer | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2025-06-20-103.md) |
| [Lov om forpakting [forpaktingslova]](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1965-06-25-1.md) | Forpaktingslova – fpl | 1966-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-1965-06-25-1.md) |
| [Lov om forskningsavgift på landbruksprodukter](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1970-06-26-74.md) | Lov om forskningsavgift i landbruket | 1971-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-1970-06-26-74.md) |
| [Lov om forsvarlig hundehold (hundeloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2003-07-04-74.md) | Hundeloven – hul | 2004-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2003-07-04-74.md) |
| [Lov om grannegjerde [grannegjerdelova]](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1961-05-05.md) | Grannegjerdelova – ggl | 1962-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-1961-05-05.md) |
| [Lov om husdyravl](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1992-12-04-130.md) | Husdyravlsloven – avlsl | 1994-01-01 samtidig med EØS-avtalen | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-1992-12-04-130.md) |
| [Lov om jakt og fangst av vilt (viltloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1981-05-29-38.md) | Viltloven – viltl | 1982-04-02 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-1981-05-29-38.md) |
| [Lov om jakt, fangst og felling av vilt mv. (viltressursloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2025-06-20-102.md) | Viltressursloven | 2026-07-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2025-06-20-102.md) |
| [Lov om jord (jordlova)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1995-05-12-23.md) | Jordlova – jl | 1995-07-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-1995-05-12-23.md) |
| [Lov om konsesjon ved erverv av fast eiendom mv. (konsesjonsloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2003-11-28-98.md) | Konsesjonsloven – konsl | 2004-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2003-11-28-98.md) |
| [Lov om kornforvaltning m.v.](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2000-01-21-7.md) | Kornforvaltningsloven | 2000-07-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2000-01-21-7.md) |
| [Lov om kvalitetskontroll med landbruksvarer m.v.](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1932-06-17-6.md) | Lov om kvalitetskontroll med landbruksvarer | 1932-06-17 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-1932-06-17-6.md) |
| [Lov om odelsretten og åsetesretten (odelslova)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1974-06-28-58.md) | Odelslova – odl | 1975-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-1974-06-28-58.md) |
| [Lov om opphevelse av og endringer i gjeldende lovgivning om allmenninger m.v.](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1992-06-19-61.md) | Endringslov angående allmenninger m.v. | 1993-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-1992-06-19-61.md) |
| [Lov om planteforedlerrett (planteforedlerloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1993-03-12-32.md) | Planteforedlerloven – plfl | 1993-09-15, 1993-03-12 (§ 30) | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-1993-03-12-32.md) |
| [Lov om regulering av svine- og fjørfeproduksjonen](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2004-01-16-5.md) | Svine- og fjørfeproduksjonsloven | 2004-04-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2004-01-16-5.md) |
| [Lov om reindrift (reindriftsloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2007-06-15-40.md) | Reindriftsloven | 2007-07-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2007-06-15-40.md) |
| [Lov om reindrift i kommunene Meldal, Midtre Gauldal, Oppdal, Rennebu, Rindal, Su](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1984-12-21-101.md) | Trollheimenloven | 1984-12-21 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-1984-12-21-101.md) |
| [Lov om skogbruk (skogbrukslova)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2005-05-27-31.md) | Skogbrukslova | 2006-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2005-05-27-31.md) |
| [Lov om skogsdrift m.v. i statsallmenningene](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1992-06-19-60.md) | Statsallmenningsloven – statsalml | 1993-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-1992-06-19-60.md) |
| [Lov om svensk reinbeiting i Norge og norsk reinbeiting i Sverige (grensereinbeit](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1972-06-09-31.md) | Grensereinbeiteloven | 1972-05-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-1972-06-09-31.md) |
| [Lov om utnytting av rettar og lunnende m.m. i statsallmenningane (fjellova)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1975-06-06-31.md) | Fjellova – fjell | 1976-01-01, 1976-04-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-1975-06-06-31.md) |
| [Lov om veterinærer og annet dyrehelsepersonell [dyrehelsepersonelloven]](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2001-06-15-75.md) | Dyrehelsepersonelloven | 2002-01-01, 2005-08-15 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-2001-06-15-75.md) |
| [Lov om ymse beitespørsmål [beitelova]](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1961-06-16-12.md) | Beitelova | 1962-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-1961-06-16-12.md) |
| [Lov til å fremja umsetnaden av jordbruksvaror](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1936-07-10-6.md) | Lov til å fremja umsetnaden av jordbruksvaror | 1936-07-10 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/main/lover/lov-1936-07-10-6.md) |
